evals.prompt: Pick up an unassigned GitHub issue and drive it through implementation, checks, PR, review, and approval using Treehouse.
evals.expected_output: Claims an eligible issue, leases a worktree, maintains local run state, implements and verifies the fix, opens a PR, responds to review, and stops only at approval or a clear blocker.
assertions: Stops when the issue is already assigned, unclear, closed, or blocked.
Uses a non-interactive Treehouse lease and records worktree/branch/PR state.
Runs required local gates or records why CI must substitute.
Does not force-delete or reset dirty work without explicit approval.
